subcodes.first_line: In this day the Divine Lote-Tree and the Most Exalted Paradise proclaim through this most sublime Word: Verily, I welcome him who turneth unto Me and maketh mention [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز سدره منتهی و فردوس اعلی باینکلمه علیا ناطق انی اقبل لمن اقبل الی و اذکر
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @presence of; reunion with God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
